message: I am the Evolution Scholar of Sejor. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Lunar Tiger into Arcane Serpent.
I can evolve Arcane Serpent into Storm Leviathan.
I can evolve Mystic Cyclops into Frozen Kraken.
I can evolve Frozen Kraken into Crystal Owlbear.
I can evolve Storm Specter into Void Phoenix.
I can evolve Void Phoenix into Celestial Serpent.

I can evolve Arcane Wolf into Ancient Griffin.
I can evolve Infernal Golem into Storm Kraken.
I can evolve Storm Kraken into Wild Phoenix.

I can evolve Ancient Titan into Storm Kraken.

I can evolve Astral Griffin into Astral Hydra.
I can evolve Lunar Leviathan into Celestial Hydra.
I can evolve Celestial Hydra into Thunder Serpent.

Choose a beast evolution.
